svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(44, 62, 80), rgb(173, 188, 204)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(26, 37, 47), rgb(198, 208, 216));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 30px; margin-left: 51px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 180px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 237px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #7F8C8D;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#7F8C8D, #6f7a7b); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 245, 227), rgb(12, 40, 24)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(169, 223, 191), rgb(22, 69, 41));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 350px; margin-left: 51px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
